title: Fix WhatsApp order message format

requirements.text:
Update the WhatsApp order message formatter in `frontend/src/utils/whatsappOrder.ts` to produce a message in exactly the following structure, with no emojis and no shortening of item names:

```
New Order - Healthy Yummy Bites

Customer Details
Name: {Customer Name}
Phone: {Customer Phone}
Address: {Customer Full Address}

Order Items
{quantity} x {Full Item Name} - ₹{price}
...

Total Amount: ₹{total}
Payment Method: Cash on Delivery / UPI
```

Rules to enforce in code:
- Quantity format must always be: `{number} x {Full Item Name}` — with a space before and after the `x`.
- Item names must be used exactly as stored in `menuData.ts` — never truncated, never abbreviated.
- Each order item must be on its own line.
- No emojis anywhere in the message.
- The message header must be `New Order - Healthy Yummy Bites` (no emoji).
- Section labels must be plain text: `Customer Details`, `Order Items`, `Total Amount:`, `Payment Method:`.

quotes: Always write quantity with space: "5 x"
Quantity format must always be: Number + space + x + space + Item Name

acceptanceCriteria: The generated WhatsApp message starts with `New Order - Healthy Yummy Bites` and contains no emojis.
Every line item follows the format `{number} x {Full Item Name} - ₹{price}` — e.g. `5 x Paneer Wrap - ₹350`.
No item name is ever shortened or truncated (e.g. `Cold Coffee` never appears as `Cold`, `Paneer Wrap` never appears as `Paneer`).
Quantity is always written as `{number} x` with a space between the number, the `x`, and the item name — never as `5x` or `2x`.
Each item appears on its own separate line.
Customer name, phone, and full address are rendered correctly under the `Customer Details` section.
Total amount and payment method appear at the bottom of the message.

requirements.text: Update `frontend/src/components/CheckoutModal.tsx` to ensure that the staff confirmation template rendered in the modal (copy-to-clipboard content) uses the same corrected message format as the WhatsApp URL — full item names, `{number} x {Full Item Name}` quantity format, no emojis, and the exact section structure defined in REQ-1.

quotes: Format must be exactly as shown below.
Each item must be on a separate line.

acceptanceCriteria: The copy-to-clipboard text in CheckoutModal matches the corrected WhatsApp message format exactly.
No truncated item names or `5x`-style quantities appear in the modal's order summary.

constraints: Do not add emojis to the WhatsApp message.
Do not shorten or abbreviate any item names — always use the full name as defined in menuData.ts.
Do not edit any file under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Adding UPI payment option to the checkout flow.
Changing any visual UI styling or layout.
Modifying menu data or item prices.
